name: ccpa
description: California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA) and California Privacy Rights Act (CPRA) compliance advisor — business threshold analysis, consumer rights fulfillment, ADMT opt-out (Jan 2027 deadline), cybersecurity audits and risk assessments (live Jan 2026), enforcement precedents (Disney $2.75M record), privacy notice drafting, SPI handling, GPC opt-out, CPPA enforcement, and GDPR alignment.
